thereunder. It is further submitted that even at the stage of Section 
313 Cr.P.C., the incriminating evidence was not put properly to

not consistent and the Trial Court committed an error in placing

12. Both the parties have filed written submissions and compilation of 
judgments in support of their case. We have considered the same. 
[2025] 9 S.C.R.  
267
Sushil Kumar Tiwari v. Hare Ram Sah & Ors.
DISCUSSION
